item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Everyone keeps talking about Jojo here, but what I get is heavy vibes of Junji Ito's Uzumaki. Either way, this is a good tribute.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
What in the fuck.

I clumsily pull back Dr. Henrik's sleeve, revealing his long, thin arm and beautiful, soft hand.

h e a v y b r e a t h i n g

This is really nice. I was going to start quibbling some stuff in the audio file of the test log, but then I realized it was very psychedelic and my tiny nits about 'Normally it would be locked, but that's okay, he has his key card' were small peas. The 'rhyming' of sentence structure, and the anomalous object arising from one of its own tests, is very interesting. This is good Lovecraftian stuff here.

A tiny grammatical note: 'D-49264's left hand (which was not making physical contact) with SCP-5688…'

Is that meant to say 'D-49264's left hand -which was not making physical contact with SCP-5688 -…' instead? I don't believe that's an adequate use of parenthesis.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
literally michael distortion from the magnus archives. creepy spiral man what dismembereth people
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
jojo parts 1-8 spoilers below

+ show block
– hide block

The effects of 5688 are similar to The Hand, Okuyasu's stand.
The references to spirals are references to The Spin, the Hamon equivalent in the second universe
The hand theft is a reference to Kira
The test logs seem to be references to different characters:
- the sledgehammer is a reference to speedwagon
- the gunshot returning and shooting the person who fired it in the stomach is a reference to mista
- the explosion of viscera is a reference to Part 8 Killer Queen (?)
The movie Revolutions is also a reference to The Spin (?)

That's all I noticed, some might be reaches though

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
He begins walking towards the main entrance, passing Dr. Carè as he goes. Dr. Carè smiles at him.

oh no

Honestly, I was a bit skeptical of the whole surreal take of the last log, but you really got me with that finishing line. Spoilers below?

+ show block
– hide block

It took me a solid 10 seconds to realize that the ant is supposed to be the doctor. Well, in a metaphorical sense anyway. A human hand will seem giant, alien and anomalous to ants, they might try to study it further, but they'll never understand what it really is.

And we're the ants in this story. I'm not sure whether I understand what else is going on in that log, but I feel like all those surreal, weird events might be caused by factors that are completely normal and mundane for some other lifeform, which is greatly above us. This turned out to be an interesting allusion, and that's the main reason for my upvote.

By the way, if it's truly connected to SCP-4972 in terms of themes, this provides a new interesting take on what happened there.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Dr Caré

Uh-oh

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The way the log's prose plays with the format of an experiment log is brilliant.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I’ve watched Jojo, and the only reference I can find is the guy taking the hand. Are there others?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
what Malice said. Not sure if I'm just not getting this or what.

neutral for the time being

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The poor doctor is just an ant in a paradoxical loop, but that's okay!

item.title: Potential spoiler
item.content:encoded:
I think I just got this.

+ show block
– hide block

The anomaly responsible for this is some sort of pataphysical reality manipulator, associated with spirals. As I said in my above, much less serious post, this could be seen to relate to the pattern screamers. This being follows Dr. Henrik home. After doing so, it removes Henrik’s hand after murdering him. It then moves out into the backyard and finds an ant colony. It buries the hand. The allusion of ants being “white-coated drones” and “faceless queens” leads me to believe that the ants are a metaphor for the Foundation and Henrik’s hand is a metaphor for 5688.

Remember that I said pataphysical reality manipulator?

Also, “test” becomes “text” for tests 5 and 6. Is this a stylistic choice or a typo? I am legitimately not sure.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: hey, i did the exact same thing!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Even if the imagery is descriptive, it doesn't seem like there's more to this SCP. There's little consistency or coherency, and like someone above me said, it's just random surreal nonsense for its own sake. -1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
God damn I love your work.

I've never watched Jojo in my life, and I don't care. The way this is written just keeps dragging you down new layers of implausibility and format-breaking intrigue. I don't know what's going on, but who cares, I want to keep not knowing and continue the ride.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I looked at this and thought “pattern screamer” and whoop de f██kin doo it’s a jojo reference apparently. +1 for mind screw.

Edit: now that I consider more it looks more like an uzumaki reference, given the spiral motif.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I can't resist a mind screw. +1, even if it was a bit weak at a few points.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: nah, it’s got to be Johnny. It’s using the Spin, after all.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The log at the end fucked me up so hard

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This feels… disparate. More so than your other work in a similar vein, which at least had some consistency and coherency — this feels like either I'm missing some major thematic connection or it's just random surreal nonsense for its own sake. Although to be fair to you, it very much could be the former.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This was creepy…….like a spiral +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Hey, Tanhony, I know how to make your SCPs better than they already are. Try the black highlighter theme. If you don't know the code. Copy and paste it from Scp-049-J or an SCP like that. Your font will look much better

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: …..I watched jojo, I didn’t see jojo in it. Now i see it everywhere……+1 and duwang gang.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
…This is a Jojo reference.

In fact, this is multiple Jojo references.
I like the changes made since I looked at it, now it allows for some surreal imagery that's fascinating as opposed to merely confusing.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Might as well continue the trend: What the everloving fuck.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
SCP-5688 is a giant human hand … The area around SCP-5688 is subject to extreme and sudden destabilization of reality

Oh, right, so we're writing the Duwang Gang as SCPs now?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
1: what the fuck +1

2: this is just yoshikage kira, you weeb

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I audibly said, "What the fuck," multiple times while reading this.

+1

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
Thanks to Westrin, Bluesoul, Cerastes, DrMoned, Gee0765, sword stuff, Laneous, Bench and Henzoid for their valued feedback!

OI JOSUKE
